dishes.name: B.L.T.
dishes.raw_description: Bacon, marinated lettuce and tomato, red wine vinaigrette, Creole mustard, sourdough bread
dishes.reasoning: Bacon is a central ingredient. | evidence: “BACON, MARINATED LETTUCE AND TOMATO”

dishes.name: B.Y.O.B.
dishes.raw_description: Two brisket patties on a brioche bun with complimentary lettuce, tomato, onion and house pickle
dishes.reasoning: The customizable burger still starts with two brisket patties. | evidence: “2 BRISKET PATTIES ON A BRIOCHE BUN”

dishes.name: B.Y.O.P.
dishes.raw_description: Made-to-order pizza with tomato sauce base and selectable meats, cheeses, condiments and vegetable toppings
dishes.reasoning: Order tomato sauce and vegetable toppings without meat, cheese, or honey sauces. | evidence: “COPPER’S TOMATO SAUCE BASE”

dishes.name: Barbeque Burger
dishes.raw_description: Lettuce, pepper jack cheese, tomato, onion ring, grilled jalapeno, house pickle, spicy barbeque
dishes.reasoning: Every burger uses two brisket patties and this one includes cheese. | evidence: “2 BRISKET PATTIES”

dishes.name: Beer Battered Fries

dishes.reasoning: Hold the ricotta and mozzarella. | evidence: “RICOTTA, FRESH BASIL, SHREDDED MOZZARELLA” [Bianca is the dish's namesake - removing it does not leave this dish]
